name: Chatwoot
description: Chatwoot is an open-source customer engagement platform providing live chat, email, and social media support channels. The API manages conversations, contacts, messages, agents, teams, and inboxes across all connected channels.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List and filter conversations with pagination and status filters.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Get full details of a specific conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new conversation with a contact in an inbox.

capabilities.name: conversations_update
capabilities.description: Update a conversation's status or priority.

capabilities.name: conversations_filter
capabilities.description: Filter conversations using advanced criteria.

capabilities.name: conversations_assign
capabilities.description: Assign a conversation to an agent or team.

capabilities.name: conversations_labels_add
capabilities.description: Add labels to a conversation for categorization.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List all messages in a conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_create
capabilities.description: Send a message to a conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a message from a conversation.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts in the account.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific contact.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact's information.

capabilities.name: contacts_search
capabilities.description: Search for contacts by name, email, or phone.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact from the account.

capabilities.name: agents_list
capabilities.description: List all agents in the account.

capabilities.name: agents_create
capabilities.description: Add a new agent to the account.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams in the account.

capabilities.name: teams_create
capabilities.description: Create a new team for grouping agents.

capabilities.name: inboxes_list
capabilities.description: List all inboxes (channels) in the account.

capabilities.name: inboxes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new inbox for receiving messages.

capabilities.name: reports_account
capabilities.description: Get account-level conversation metrics and agent performance data.

capabilities.name: canned_responses_list
capabilities.description: List all canned responses for quick agent replies.

capabilities.name: canned_responses_create
capabilities.description: Create a new canned response with a short code.
